data.body: Layer-2 first-pass all BLOCK; remediated: 2f8e(idempotency via _is_active_link), c595(lizard/jscpd invocations+parse, commit-date ts, int value schema), 1f77(path reports->.rebar; DROP CI-commit step—read-only perms; harvester is persistence path), 538c(isolation guard targets existing registry/__init__ not nonexistent metrics.py; deterministic keyword classifier not LLM; drop human-calibration gate).
